item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
thanks i hate it
absolutely
love my samoas
hope so
making other countries look silly
something something stepping on legos joke
imagine being an accountant for the Jedi
disclaimer.. i haven't tried this yet but it sounds kinda cool
mmm hmm
i'm a fan of edibles
new jack city is the real movie
works for me
ahh.. the egg dream
as is tradition
yes i'm posting this image again
i'm also concerned tbh
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: V
item.description: Dedicated to my perverted neighbour that told his wife that he was "checking" in case "I wasn't a woman" when she caught him peeping several times. Fuck you, Sebastian. Big Ben for you. I pity that poor woman. She has 4 kids with him...
item.dc:creator: eaglerider

item.title: The 386th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - DOGS WITH SOUND Edition #3
item.description:
DATA WARNING! ALL VIDEO DUMP!
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #Puppers #Doggos #PuppersAndDoggos #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: What a way to start the week...
item.description: My mom lost the battle with cancer this morning, and I'm struggling. She was my favorite person in the world. I wasn't ready to lose her at 26 years old. I'm watching Charmed right now. It was the show we watched together when I was growing up. I feel so empty. I could use some help cheering up a bit, maybe send some memes. Miss you, mom. EDIT: Never expected to get Most Viral. Thank you to everyone for the well wishes and even the bits of dark humour. I appreciate you all so much, what a great community.
item.dc:creator: NLMA9127

item.title: With The Current Ongoing Arctic Event
item.description: Thought this old photo was relevant. Most Viral Edit: You all stay toasty out there. There is a moderate chance of us seeing snow in the AM. I hope it does, my daughter will be so excited. In the meantime, never forget, it's about the cones.
item.dc:creator: itsallaboutthecones

item.title: Fellas, is it gay to love your wife?

item.title: Just a little meme dump, as a treat
item.description:
I do love a good jar. Yesterday I seriously considered buying something I don’t need just because it came in a dope jar.
America is cold af right now
It just goes to the chair (you know which chair)
Fuck dem Fascists
What women want
Hurt people hurt people: testosterone edition
I don’t know who these people are that are fine with peeing a thousand times a day, but I ain’t got time for that. If I’m thirsty, I drink. Seems like overkill to force it.
Fun fact: solitary bees (and wasps) are MUCH more efficient pollinators than honey bees, they just aren’t easy to capitalize on commercially so they don’t get nearly the attention and support they should.
Hope it’s got some of those cheddar biscuit smells still
Nature is endlessly beautiful and I am here on earth to experience it
I know most of y’all checking in from the toilet. Don’t push too hard and wash your goddamn hands afterwards!
item.dc:creator: KlvrDissident

item.description: I’ve seen a fair number of their ranks downtown Salt Lake City at 29 degrees today. Edit: Since the conversion bot has seemed to gone the way of the Mars Rover: 29°F = -1.67°C.

item.title: He seems nice.
item.description: Michael Gordon Peterson (born 1952) aka Charles Arthur Salvador, aka Charles Ali Ahmed, aka "Charlie Bronson" was an unusually calm and well-mannered child. But in his teens he started getting into trouble. At 13, he appeared for the first time in juvenile court for robbery. Over the next decade he would have several more serious run-ins with the law. At 22, in 1974, with a wife, son, and a job, he unexpectedly committed an armed robbery at a post office, stealing just over £26. Because of his prior convictions he received a seven-year prison sentence, leading to a prolonged stay behind bars. He was always in excellent physical shape, and worked as a circus strongman at one time. Upon his release in 1987, he began an underground bare-knuckle boxing career in the East End of London - on the advice of long-time friend Reggie Kray. (See: the movie "The Krays" 1990.) His fight promoter bestowed upon him the nickname "Charlie Bronson," inspired by the famous movie tough guy. After 69 days of freedom on New Year's Day 1988 he robbed a jewellery shop, kept a ring for his new girlfriend, and sold the rest of the stolen jewelry. On 7 January 1988 he was apprehended and arrested on his morning jog and returned to prison. Instead of rehabilitating Peterson specialized in assaulting guards, abusing fellow prisoners, blackmailing, making threats, and taking hostages. This led to frequent prison transfers and a reputation for being an "threat level 5" or "most dangerous individual." He was released from prison again in November 1992 but was arrested 53 days later for conspiracy to rob. One of Bronson's iconic exploits in prison involved a hostage situation on the roof of a secure psychiatric facility, causing £250,000 in damages. He demanded a blow-up doll, a helicopter, and tea. His bad behavior led to multiple extended sentences. In 1998, he infamously took two Iraqi inmates, along with another inmate named Jason Greasley hostage. He demanded a plane to take him to Libya, two Uzi sub-machine guns, 5,000 rounds of ammunition, and an axe. He finally agreed to release the hostages and walk back to the segregation unit. Another seven years were added to his sentence. Bronson's personal life included two marriages, one of which involved a conversion to Islam and a name change to Charles Ali Ahmed. He authored numerous books on health, diet, strength exercises, and poetry, receiving awards for the latter. His life was depicted in the 2009 film "Bronson," with actor Tom Hardy. Despite periodic attempts at parole, Bronson remains incarcerated, last being denied parole in 2023.
item.dc:creator: Hojotukiman
